name: Light Family Fruit Squares (Scottish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Set oven to 350°F or Mark 4.
2. Line an 8-inch square cake tin with buttered greaseproof paper.
3. Cream together the butter or margarine and sugar in a bowl.
4. Add the eggs one at a time, beating each well into the mixture.
5. Sift the flour and salt and fold them in gradually with the milk.
6. Add the fruit and orange zest, ensuring it is evenly mixed in.
7. Spoon the mixture into the tin and bake for 40-45 minutes until a skewer inserted comes out clean.
8. Turn off the oven and let cool on a wire rack.
9. Cut into squares.
